message:
test(core): add probe tests for UPDATE/defaults/autoincrement and string functions

Expand systematic behavioral coverage with 2 more probe tests:
- UPDATE with CASE, defaults, autoincrement monotonicity, changes()
- String functions: LENGTH, REPLACE, INSTR, LTRIM/RTRIM/TRIM, HEX,
  ZEROBLOB, PRINTF, GROUP_CONCAT, TOTAL

1568 tests, 0 failures. All quality gates green.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
